k3.description: Fix third radial distortion coefficient (fixed by default).

HandEyeMode.description:
Hand-eye calibration mode.

Specifies the transform chain used for hand-eye calibration.

oneOf.description:
Camera mounted on robot end-effector (gripper).

Transform chain: P_camera = extr^-1 * handeye^-1 * robot^-1 * target * P_world

Camera fixed in workspace, observes robot end-effector.

Transform chain: P_camera = extr^-1 * handeye * robot * target * P_world

refine_cam_se3_rig_in_handeye_ba.description:
Refine cam_se3_rig in hand-eye BA (default: false).
When true, rig extrinsics are further refined during hand-eye optimization.

refine_robot_poses.description: Refine robot poses in hand-eye BA (default: true).

refine_scheimpflug_in_handeye_ba.description:
Refine Scheimpflug tilt parameters in hand-eye BA (default: false).
Only consulted when [`SensorMode::Scheimpflug`] is configured; ignored
for [`SensorMode::Pinhole`].

robot_rot_sigma.description: Robot rotation sigma for prior (radians). Default: 0.5° ≈ 0.0087 rad.

robot_trans_sigma.description: Robot translation sigma for prior (meters). Default: 1mm = 0.001.

RigHandeyeInitConfig.description: Hand-eye linear initialization options for rig hand-eye calibration.

min_motion_angle_deg.description: Minimum motion angle (degrees) for linear hand-eye initialization.

RigHandeyeIntrinsicsConfig.description: Per-camera intrinsics initialization options for rig hand-eye calibration.

init_iterations.description: Number of iterations for iterative intrinsics estimation.

RigHandeyeRigConfig.description: Rig-specific options for rig hand-eye calibration.

fix_first_rig_pose.description: Fix first rig pose for gauge freedom (default: true, fixes view 0).

reference_camera_idx.description: Reference camera index for rig frame (identity extrinsics).

refine_intrinsics_in_rig_ba.description: Re-refine intrinsics in rig BA (default: false).

RigHandeyeSolverConfig.description: Solver options shared across rig and hand-eye optimization stages.

robust_loss.description: Robust loss function for outlier handling.

RobustLoss.description:
Robust loss applied to a residual block.

Each residual block has its own loss; per-point robustification is achieved
by using one residual block per observation.

SensorMode.description:
Sensor flavour for rig calibration workflows.

`Pinhole` is the default and matches a standard multi-camera rig with
pure pinhole + Brown-Conrady distortion projection. `Scheimpflug` adds
per-camera tilt parameters; per-camera intrinsics share the pinhole core
but include a tilted sensor plane in projection.

The `Scheimpflug` variant carries its own bootstrap defaults and BA-stage
fix masks so the rest of the workflow config stays shared between flavours.

Re-exported by [`crate::rig_extrinsics::SensorMode`] and
[`crate::rig_handeye::SensorMode`] (single source of truth in `rig_family`).

distortion_mask_in_percam_ba.description:
Distortion mask applied during per-camera Scheimpflug intrinsics
refinement. Defaults to [`DistortionFixMask::radial_only`]
(k1, k2 free; k3, p1, p2 fixed) — a safe choice for typical
Scheimpflug rigs where tangential distortion can absorb tilt-like
signal. Narrow-FOV rigs that overfit k2 may want
`(k1, p1, p2) free, (k2, k3) fixed` instead.

fix_scheimpflug_in_intrinsics.description: Mask for Scheimpflug parameters during per-camera intrinsics refinement.

init_tilt_x.description:
Initial Scheimpflug tilt around X (radians) — used only when no
per-camera sensor seed is supplied via the workflow's manual init.

init_tilt_y.description: Initial Scheimpflug tilt around Y (radians) — same convention.

refine_scheimpflug_in_rig_ba.description: Re-refine Scheimpflug parameters in rig BA (default: false).

description:
Configuration for multi-camera rig hand-eye calibration.

Shared between pinhole and Scheimpflug rigs; the [`SensorMode`] field
`sensor` selects the sensor flavour.

sensor.description: Sensor flavour (pinhole or Scheimpflug). Default is `Pinhole`.

solver.description: Shared solver settings for optimization stages.

title: RigHandeyeConfig
